channel.title: Posts on Atte Niemi
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Atte Niemi

item.title: Starting learning binary exploitation
item.description: I’ve began studying some basic binary exploitation. I decided to write down the process for some of the tasks I finished. flag - pwnable The challenge is to reverse a binary called flag to find the flag. Let’s do chmod +x flag and run it: kali@kali:~/Documents/pwnable/flag$ ./flag I will malloc() and strcpy the flag there. take it. I tried using gdb flag to start debugging, but info functions or disas main didn’t work.
